it:92.3: "Saṅghāṭikaṇṇe cepi, bhikkhave, bhikkhu gahetvā piṭṭhito piṭṭhito anubandho assa pāde pādaṁ nikkhipanto, so ca hoti abhijjhālu kāmesu tibbasārāgo byāpannacitto paduṭṭhamanasaṅkappo muṭṭhassati asampajāno asamāhito vibbhantacitto pākatindriyo; atha kho so ārakāva mayhaṁ, ahañca tassa. Taṁ kissa hetu? Dhammañhi so, bhikkhave, bhikkhu na passati. Dhammaṁ apassanto na maṁ passati.
it:92.4:
Yojanasate cepi so, bhikkhave, bhikkhu vihareyya. So ca hoti anabhijjhālu kāmesu na tibbasārāgo abyāpannacitto apaduṭṭhaapaduṭṭhamanasaṅkappomanasaṅkappo upaṭṭhitassati sampajāno samāhito ekaggacitto saṁvutindriyo; atha kho so santikeva mayhaṁ, ahañca tassa. Taṁ kissa hetu? Dhammañhi so, bhikkhave, bhikkhu passati; dhammaṁ passanto maṁ passatī"ti. Etamatthaṁ bhagavā avoca. Tatthetaṁ iti vuccati:
"Anubandhopi ce assa,
mahiccho ca vighātavā;
Ejānugo anejassa,
nibbutassa anibbuto;
Giddho so vītagedhassa,
passa yāvañca ārakā.
it:92.5:
Yo ca dhammamabhiññāya,
dhammamaññāya paṇḍito;
Rahadova nivāte ca,
anejo vūpasammati.
it:92.6:
Anejo so anejassa,
nibbutassa ca nibbuto;
Agiddho vītagedhassa,
passa yāvañca santike"ti.
it:92.7:
Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.
Tatiyaṁ.
